instructions.summary: Add comprehensive testing infrastructure for monoio server
instructions.objective: Add proptest, fuzzing, and comprehensive integration tests to ensure production readiness.
instructions.constraints: - Use proptest for property-based testing - Use cargo-fuzz for HTTP parser fuzzing - Integration tests must cover edge cases and stress scenarios - All tests must pass in CI - No performance regressions

context.tree: harrow-server-monoio/ ├── src/ │ ├── lib.rs │ ├── connection.rs │ ├── codec.rs # HTTP parser - main fuzz target │ ├── cancel.rs │ └── kernel_check.rs ├── tests/ │ └── integration.rs # Existing tests └── fuzz/ # To create └── fuzz_targets/ └── parse_request.rs

guidance.notes: 1. Start with codec proptests - round-trip properties 2. Fuzz target for try_parse_request - focus on malformed input 3. Integration tests should stress cancellation paths 4. Consider using harrow-core/fuzz as template
